YEAR = 2026
RACE_NAME_FOR_RESULTS = Race 3
RACE_NAME_FOR_FILENAMES = minitour_race3

OUTPUT_ERRORS_TO_CONSOLE = true

# Relative to directory containing configuration file.
ENTRIES_PATH = entries.txt
RAW_RESULTS_PATH = rawtimes.txt

# Relative to project root directory.
ENTRY_CATEGORIES_PATH = /src/main/resources/configuration/categories_entry_individual_junior.csv
PRIZE_CATEGORIES_PATH = /src/main/resources/configuration/categories_prize_individual_junior.csv

# Comma-separated sequence of bib-number/start-offset.
